name: Coverage: Assistant query schedule in docked chat
description: User opens docked AI chat and asks what is on the calendar; receives a schedule-related assistant reply.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click Sign in and wait for the dashboard
Open AI chat via Open AI chat button or Control+K
Wait 2 seconds for Ask your calendar panel
Type What do I have this week? into the assistant input and click Send
Wait up to 8 seconds for the assistant response

Verify the assistant replies with schedule content in English (preferred): event list, empty-day message such as No events found, structured cards, or a clear calendar summary. Indonesian copy alone is not required when UI language is English.
